text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the tryouts finally arrives.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Lotus roots, celery stalks, spinach leaves... Lotus roots, celery stalks,
spinach leaves...
choice_data_list: Is that some kind of incantation?
Is that some kind of incantation?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's for good luck! This chant will allow me to focus my willpower and
perform to the best of my ability!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've trained as much as I could! Regardless of how this race turns out, I will make you my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Fukukitaru! How ya feelin'?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... We'd like to watch you run today, if you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Taiki, Suzuka! Are you here to cheer for me?! It's nice knowing
the two of you've got my back!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's been a busy couple of weeks, but I think I'm ready, thanks to you
guys!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't even mention it! Tear up that racetrack! Show 'em what you've
got! Don't worry about Suzuka and me. We'll be making our debut
soon enough too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the head start, you two! See you at the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All right, then... It's about time I head out. I'll try not to lose too hard!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, give it your—
Wait, what?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Be back soon!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Does she intend on losing or something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race soon commences, and Matikanefukukitaru blasts out of the
starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This much-awaited race is completely packed with extremely skilled
runners! Who will come out on top?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is falling behind! Are the leading Umamusume too
fast for her?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Mgrrrgh! They're all... so fast...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That's fine though. I just need to do what I promised I would—run!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Let's goooo! Super Fortune Daaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners have made their final turn and are entering the final
stretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is picking up the pace from behind! Will she be
able to close the gap?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Maaan, I thought for a second there that I could overtake them all...
How'd I still end up in last place?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Still, you were so close... Had you another fifty meters, you would've
easily cleared the whole group.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! You might've been last, but you definitely had the
biggest impact!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Awww, you guys are being too nice.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Ah, Matikanefukukitaru! There you are! Please, let me scout you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? You want to... scout me?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That burst of speed during the last leg of the race was a sight to
behold! I'm positive that you and I can accomplish anything together!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text: No, she needs my guidance! I'll be the one to scout her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Why are all these people coming to me? I was in last place!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but destiny has already decided my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru politely declines the offers from the trainers
around her and looks my way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her belief in divinations is unrivaled, and it goes without saying she's
a real character. Yet I can tell she loves running more than anything.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... I'm not very good under pressure. Whenever I get nervous, I
feel like I'll start babbling some random incantation at any moment...
choice_data_list: Let's create our own good fortune!
Let's create our own good fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Now that's more like it! Good fortune doesn't just come to
those who wait around doing nothing! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With tryouts behind us, I officially take on the role of
Matikanefukukitaru's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So how about we get started? Not a second to waste!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm, actually... Before we begin, could I ask you one small favor?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was doing a carrot divination earlier, and it said that partner running
would be today's lucky activity. Problem is, Suzuka's busy today...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Could you run with me today?! Please, just this once!
choice_data_list: Our paces wouldn't match at all!
Our paces wouldn't match at all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No worries! If you start falling behind, I'll just drag you along! So let's
goooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can even begin to question my decisions thus far, she takes
off running, leaving me with no choice but to frantically attempt to
keep up.
